name: ExtensionCoverage_CostToBeneficiary_Network
title: R5: In or out of network (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Coverage.costToBeneficiary.network` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Coverage.costToBeneficiary.network` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Coverage.costToBeneficiary.network` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Coverage.costToBeneficiary.network` has a context of Coverage.costToBeneficiary based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Coverage`.
Element `Coverage.costToBeneficiary.network` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: In or out of network (new)
element.comment:
Element `Coverage.costToBeneficiary.network` has a context of Coverage.costToBeneficiary based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Coverage`.
Element `Coverage.costToBeneficiary.network` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: Is a flag to indicate whether the benefits refer to in-network providers or out-of-network providers.
